walk stZeroKnowledge and stZeroKnowledge2 after confirming pairing precompile coverage
walk stTimeConsuming and stQuadraticComplexityTest under a separate slow-verify step

suites.name: ethereum-tests-blockchain

remaining: decode typed and legacy block transactions into block_builder execution inputs
assert InvalidBlocks fail for the expected reason

suites.name: execution-spec-tests
suites.reason: Phase-1 release verification activates the generated state fixtures and structural blockchain fixture walks available in this checkout; broader generated fixture execution remains tracked expansion work.
remaining: execution-spec-tests/fixtures is absent in this checkout; current active coverage walks src/ethereum_test_specs/tests/fixtures and tests/static/state_tests
walk generated state_test fixtures by fork
support EIP-1559, blob, and set-code transaction forms
execute blockchain fixtures instead of structural-only validation
compare logs hash, state hash, and all post-state entries for fixtures without explicit postState/state

suites.name: hive-rpc-compat
suites.reason: Phase-1 release verification runs ZEVM through the active Hive-compatible launch, identity, unknown-account, and head forkchoice coverage while full rpc-compat state/receipt/log/payload lifecycle remains outside the current release contract.
remaining: phase-1 query-only chain.rlp import intentionally does not execute imported payloads into ZEVM state
phase-1 query-only chain.rlp import intentionally does not index receipts and logs for imported blocks
implement Engine payload methods before promoting full imported-chain lifecycle coverage
run every rpc-compat .io transcript, including block, receipt, log, call, estimate, and sendRawTransaction methods
